purpose: Provide executable acceptance evidence for FT-001 as a feature.
success_outcome: FT-001 catalog browsing, category, search, filters, and edge cases are verified through local integration/e2e evidence.

success_checks: E2E covers catalog browse, category browse, required filters, search, combined search+filters, empty result state, and missing optional attributes.
Integration/e2e evidence uses seeded backend data and the Windows-native local runtime, not hardcoded frontend data.
REQ-001, REQ-002, and REQ-003 have executable evidence.
evidence_required: Storefront catalog e2e output, trace, screenshot, or video artifact links.

stop_conditions: Windows-native local runtime is not available from FT-011.
Tests cannot prove category/search/filter behavior through seeded backend data.
E2E coverage requires scope outside FT-001 acceptance criteria.
required_handoff: Do not mark done without integration/e2e evidence covering REQ-001 through REQ-003.
